## Tollgate checklist

> The `route-approval` workflow will post the tier-specific checklist automatically.
> Complete all items before requesting merge.

- [ ] Frontmatter updated: `version`, `next_review_date`, `owner` confirmed correct
- [ ] Document body reviewed and all changes are accurate
- [ ] `change_type` set in frontmatter (`material` or `immaterial`)
- [ ] Approval label applied (`approved-t1`, `approved-t2`, or `approved-t3`)

---

> _Merging this PR will trigger the publish workflow: `effective_date` and `last_reviewed_date`
> will be updated automatically and an audit log entry will be appended._
